title: NookDiscs
description: A resource pack that replaces Minecraft music discs with Animal Crossing tracks, playable directly in-game with no mods required.
body:
![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/38339a4c59955de1f3c19a4d7d10b089c5da5bec.jpeg)

**NookDiscs** is a simple resource pack that replaces Minecraft’s music discs with tracks inspired by Animal Crossing.

Unlike NookOST, this version does not require any mod.
Simply install the pack and play — all music works directly in vanilla Minecraft.

Each music disc has been replaced with a unique track, allowing you to enjoy a relaxing and cozy atmosphere while playing.

## 🎶 Included Tracks

This pack replaces music discs with the following tracks:

- K.K. Gumbo (DJ)
- K.K. Fusion (DJ)
- K.K. Folk (DJ)
- K.K. Far West (DJ)
- K.K. Étude
- K.K. El Condor
- K.K. Drum & Bass
- K.K. DJ
- K.K. Country
- K.K. Complainte
- K.K. Chorale
- K.K. Techno
- K.K. Calypso
- K.K. Boogie
- K.K. Bossa
- K.K. Berceuse
- K.K. Ballade
- K.K. Aria
- K.K. 2 jours plus tôt


## 📦 Features
Replaces all Minecraft music discs
Works in vanilla Minecraft
No mod required
Simple plug-and-play installation
Perfect for survival, chill gameplay, and servers


## 📥 Installation

1️⃣ Download the resource pack
2️⃣ Drag the .zip into your folder:

```
.minecraft/resourcepacks
```

3️⃣ Launch Minecraft
4️⃣ Enable the pack in Resource Packs menu

✅ That’s it — no setup needed!

## 🌿 Optional Add-on

For a fully dynamic music experience, you can also use:


### 👉 NookOST
This adds:

24h dynamic music
biome-based music
weather-based transitions


## 🎯 Goal

The goal of this pack is to bring the relaxing vibe of Animal Crossing into Minecraft, while keeping everything simple and accessible.
